news.summary: A new chapter will begin for Duke-NUS Medical School in Singapore as they welcome Professor Patrick Tan as their fourth Dean, starting on 1 January 2026. This appointment signifies a continuation of the school's commitment to excellence in medical education, research, and innovation. Professor Tan will bring his expertise to lead the institution towards further success.
news.headline: Patrick Tan appointed as Dean of Duke-NUS Medical School starting Jan 1, 2026, showcasing a new era of medical advancement.

news.summary: Today, Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NYSE: XHR) revealed the sale of the Fairmont Dallas, a 545-room property, for $111 million. This equates to around $203,670 per room. The selling price signifies an 8.6x multiple.
news.headline: Xenia Hotels & Resorts sells Fairmont Dallas for $111 million at $203,670 per key, an 8.6x multiple.

news.summary: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, on April 11, 2025, GFG Resources Inc. (TSXV: GFG) (OTCQB: GFGSF) has announced an update to its private placement offering. The company has decided to increase the offering to C$3.0 million and change the sale of premium flow-through units. Each Premium Unit will now include one common share and one whole share purchase warrant, allowing the holder to acquire an additional common share at C$0.28 within 24 months. Both the common shares and warrants in the Premium Units qualify as "flow-through shares" under the Income Tax Act (Canada).
news.headline: GFG increases private placement to C$3.0 million, amends Premium Units to include common shares and warrants.

news.summary: The surface exploration program in 2024 has yielded more impressive results, with high-grade gold rock samples being discovered. In the Wombat area, samples have shown gold concentrations reaching up to 360 grams per tonne (g/t Au), while in the RPM Regional area, samples have exhibited gold grades as high as 56.3 g/t Au. These findings demonstrate the continued success of the exploration efforts in identifying valuable gold deposits.
news.headline: Nova Minerals reports high-grade gold rock samples up to 360 g/t Au at Wombat & up to 56.3 g/t Au in RPM Regional area

news.summary: A hack on Morpho Labs' DeFi protocol led to the theft of $2.6 million in crypto assets, which were intercepted by a white hat MEV operator named c0ffeebabe.eth. Morpho Labs implemented a front-end update on April 10, leading to a vulnerability exploited by a hacker. The stolen funds were intercepted by the white hat hacker before being transferred to another wallet. Morpho Labs rolled back the update and ensured the safety of all funds in their protocol. The team identified and fixed the issue, confirming that users' assets are secure. The MEV operator has a history of recovering funds, including $5.4 million in a previous exploit. The team is yet to provide a detailed explanation of the incident.
news.headline: White hat hacker intercepts $2.6M in Morpho Labs breach; funds returned by MEV operator c0ffeebabe.eth in DeFi exploits.

Additionally, a new snack was introduced that combines Reese's peanut butter with pretzel, and PayPal revealed a new partnership campaign featuring actor Will Ferrell. news.summary: Corus Entertainment Inc. reported a decrease in consolidated revenue by 10% for the quarter and 11% for the year-to-date. Consolidated segment profit decreased by 67% for the quarter and 41% for the year-to-date, with a net loss attributable to shareholders of $55.9 million for the quarter and $44.0 million for the year-to-date. Free cash flow was $46.0 million for the quarter and $35.9 million for the year-to-date. The company highlighted strong audience performance and the success of new lifestyle brands. Television advertising revenue was ahead of outlook for the quarter. Corus announced completion of assignment of indebtedness and an amended credit facility. Segment profit margins and net debt to segment profit were also discussed. The Company provided financial highlights, segment revenue breakdown, operational highlights, risks and uncertainties, and outlook for the future. Corus reported non-GAAP financial measures and cautioned concerning forward-looking information. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Corus Entertainment reports decreased revenue for quarters, with consolidated revenue down 10%. Net loss at $55.9 million.

news.summary: Unity Bancorp, Inc. reported a net income of $11.6 million, or $1.13 per diluted share, for the quarter ended March 31, 2025, showing a 0.8% increase from the previous quarter. The company's president and CEO, James A. Hughes, highlighted the strong financial results with a 1.83% Return on Assets (ROA) and a 15.56% Return on Equity (ROE). The Commercial and Residential lending sectors saw significant growth with loans increasing by $84.5 million, a 3.74% rise from year-end. Additionally, retail division showed prowess in deposit gathering, increasing customer deposits by $90.7 million, 4.82% quarterly growth. The company aims to maintain balance sheet stability, fund future credit growth through deposit growth, and uphold disciplined credit-risk management practices. This news was reported by Unity Bancorp, Inc. through a press release on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Unity Bancorp reported quarterly earnings of $11.6 million, a 0.8% increase from the previous quarter, with a 1.83% ROA and 15.56% ROE.

news.summary: A recent report shows that the global wheat production for the current year is predicted to reach a record high of 780 million metric tons, with major increases in production rates noted in countries like China, India, and the European Union. The report also indicates a 2% rise in global wheat consumption, reaching a total of 740 million metric tons, leading to a surplus of 40 million metric tons by the end of the year. This surplus is expected to positively impact global food security and prices of wheat products. Experts suggest that with this surplus, measures should be taken to ensure proper storage and distribution to avoid any waste and to effectively utilize this achievement in addressing hunger and malnutrition worldwide.
news.headline: Markets and industry groups in panic over Trump's tariff changes.

news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus and Atlanta on April 11, 2025, Schwarzwald Capital, a prominent venture capital firm specializing in fintech and the creator economy, revealed a significant investment in Vesta. Vesta is a worldwide frontrunner in providing transaction guarantee services for online platforms and other industries.
news.headline: Schwarzwald Capital invests in Vesta to boost fraud prevention in digital payments. Deal announced on April 11, 2025.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on April 11, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, revealed a new plan to increase availability of BTC staking. This strategic initiative involves partnering with Lombard Finance, the company behind LBTC, the top staked BTC platform. Bybit aims to broaden access to BTC staking services through this collaboration, offering users more opportunities to engage with the cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Bybit partners with Lombard Finance offering BTC staking with up to 5% APY, 2nd largest exchange by volume.

news.summary: In Reno, Nevada on April 11, 2025, i-80 Gold Corp disclosed that Matthew Gili, the President & Chief Operating Officer, will be resigning from his position. Following this announcement, Mr. Gili will remain in his role as President while stepping down from his duties as COO. This development comes as part of the operational changes within i-80 Gold Corp, listed on TSX as IAU and NYSE as IAUX.
news.headline: i-80 Gold Corp. (TSX: IAU) (NYSE: IAUX) announces President & COO Matthew Gili stepping down from his role.

news.summary: Bitcoin is showing signs of a potential turnaround as per John Bollinger, creator of Bollinger bands volatility metric. The %b metric suggests Bitcoin might be establishing a long-term bottom, indicating a potential W-shaped bottom formation for BTC/USD. On both weekly and daily timeframes, Bollinger bands indicate no trend shift yet. Jurrien Timmer from Fidelity Investments sees similarities in stock market trends. Bitcoin's bounce is anticipated after a 10% Nasdaq drop, with a potential bottom around $70,000. Network economist Timothy Peterson predicts Bitcoin will reverse its decline after stocks stabilize, expecting a further 10% drop in Nasdaq. This article stresses that investment decisions carry risks and readers should conduct their own research.
news.headline: Bitcoin forming 'classic' floor near $80K per Bollinger bands creator; BTC may establish long-term bottom soon, suggests data.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.8% in the month of October, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The economy added a total of 531,000 jobs in October, surpassing economists' expectations. This decline in unemployment and increase in job creation are positive indicators for the country's economic recovery. Additionally, the report highlighted that the labor force participation rate also increased to 61.6% last month. The growth in employment was seen across various sectors, including professional and business services, manufacturing, and transportation. Overall, these statistics point to a strengthening job market and improving economic conditions in the United States.
news.headline: German Bunds outpacing US bonds by record margin amid market turmoil, with US yields up to 2.3% higher.

news.summary: In Castries, Saint Lucia, on April 11, 2025, PrimeXBT, a reputable global broker, has enhanced its Referral Program. This update permits customers to gift rewards to friends amounting to $100 at no cost, and in return, they can earn a commission of 20% based on their friends' trading activity. Terms and conditions apply to this offer.
news.headline: PrimeXBT is offering $100 gifts to friends through its Referral Program, letting clients earn a 20% commission on trading activity.
